age_range.evidence: The analysis presented in this study is based on a sub-sample of 4083 participants who responded to a self-report questionnaire at a mean age of 24 years old in 2016/17.

countries.evidence: The sample for this study is drawn from the Avon Longitudinal Study of Parents and Children (ALSPAC)... resident in Avon, UK

fieldwork_year.evidence: The analysis presented in this study is based on a sub-sample of 4083 participants who responded to a self-report questionnaire at a mean age of 24 years old in 2016/17.

gender_split.evidence: All social media users in the sample (N = 4083) are split by female (N = 2698) and male (N = 1385)

sample_size.evidence: The analysis presented in this study is based on a sub-sample of 4083 participants who responded to a self-report questionnaire
